title: bilabrella lisowskii
intro: Bilabrella lisowskii, also known as Chinese chrysanthemum, is a flowering plant native to China and is used in traditional medicine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of the common cold and flu. Bilabrella lisowskii is also believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it beneficial for overall health and well-being. Herbal preparations of Bilabrella lisowskii include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote general health.
